question: Which collection have most number of documents? List collection name, id and number of documents.
sql: SELECT Collections.Collection_Name, Collections.Collection_ID, COUNT(Documents_in_Collections.Document_Object_ID) AS num_documents FROM Collections INNER JOIN Documents_in_Collections ON Collections.Collection_ID = Documents_in_Collections.Collection_ID GROUP BY Collections.Collection_ID ORDER BY num_documents DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个集合中的文档数量并找出文档数量最多的集合

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。SQL意图准确统计每个集合的文档数量（通过COUNT聚合），按Collection_ID分组，并按文档数量降序排列取最大值，最终输出的字段（Collection_Name, Collection_ID, num_documents）与原始问题要求的'collection name, id and number of documents'完全匹配。
